comments: Approved. The continuity note explicitly states that M4 validation through src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts exposed the MCP path-resolution fragility and that M5 then hardened get_dispatch_state, get_iteration_state, and get_execution_diff using process.env.PROJECT_ROOT || process.cwd(). It also explicitly justifies the separation as necessary to preserve independent execution contracts, result reviews, artifact trails, and L2/L3 governance boundaries. Fresh git status/diff checks showed no modified implementation files in the repository at review time.
